writing.title: Writing Task 1: Urban vs rural (combined comparison)
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) comparing city and countryside life, combining comparative, superlative, and as...as structures.
writing.sampleAnswer: Rural life is more peaceful than city life. The city is more developed, but it's also more crowded. The suburbs are quieter than the city centre, but still convenient.
checklist: Kết hợp được ít nhất 2 dạng so sánh khác nhau
Mô tả rõ ưu/nhược điểm của cả hai khu vực

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Predict urban change
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) predicting how a city will change, using will/going to and comparison.
writing.sampleAnswer: The population will grow a lot, based on the current trend. The city is going to expand into the countryside. The population here will probably double in ten years.
checklist: Dùng will hoặc going to để dự đoán xu hướng
Có dữ kiện/con số cụ thể
Kết hợp được so sánh khi mô tả thay đổi
